decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing disruptive spells like Force of Will, Thoughtseize, and Daze to control the opponent's resources while deploying efficient threats like Murktide Regent and Kaito, Bane of Nightmares. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and selection, while Brainstorm and Ponder help to sculpt the perfect hand. Wasteland is used to disrupt the opponent's mana base, and Orcish Bowmasters can help deal with problematic creatures. The goal is to apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's game plan, ultimately outpacing them to secure the win.

The deck is focused on quickly comboing off by milling your entire library with cards like Balustrade Spy and Undercity Informer, and then winning the game with Thassa's Oracle. To support the combo, the deck includes cards like Dark Ritual, Lotus Petal, and Simian Spirit Guide to accelerate your mana, as well as Pact of Negation to protect your combo. The inclusion of cards like Cabal Therapy and Elvish Spirit Guide helps with disruption and consistency. By playing aggressively and deploying your combo pieces efficiently, you aim to win the game before your opponent can respond.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and efficiently reanimate powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Archon of Cruelty using cards like Shallow Grave, Reanimate, and Animate Dead. The deck also includes a strong disruption package with cards like Thoughtseize, Collective Brutality, and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures while disrupting their hand and board state, ultimately leading to a quick victory through a combination of powerful creatures and disruption spells.

This deck focuses on using artifacts to control the opponent's board while locking them out of playing their spells. It uses cards like Grim Monolith, Trinisphere, and Karn, the Great Creator to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also utilizing powerful artifacts like Urza's Tower and Ugin, Eye of the Storms to gain advantage. The goal is to establish a lock on the game using cards like The One Ring and Pithing Needle, eventually overwhelming the opponent with powerful threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. The deck aims to control the game and outvalue the opponent through its artifact synergy and prison effects.

This Boros Aggro Legacy deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and disrupting their strategy with cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Swords to Plowshares. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional support and finishers, while cards like Goblin Bombardment and Static Prison add versatility and control options. The mana base is carefully constructed with fetch lands and dual lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors. With a mix of aggressive threats and disruptive elements, this deck aims to apply pressure and disrupt opponents' plans efficiently.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage to disrupt the opponent's game plan while gradually building your own board presence. It utilizes versatile cards like Force of Will and Force of Negation to stop key threats, along with powerful spells like Brainstorm and Ponder for card selection. The deck also includes a mix of removal spells such as Swords to Plowshares and Prismatic Ending, as well as threats like Murktide Regent and Thundertrap Trainer to close out the game. Additionally, Lórien Revealed and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provide additional card advantage and utility, while Back to Basics can punish opponents reliant on nonbasic lands.

This deck focuses on aggressively playing threats like Delver of Secrets and Murktide Regent while disrupting the opponent with counterspells like Force of Will and Daze. It also utilizes cards like Ponder and Brainstorm to find the right spells and maintain tempo. With a mix of efficient creatures, disruption, and card selection, the deck aims to pressure the opponent quickly and efficiently, forcing them to react and keeping them on their back foot. The key strategy is to apply pressure while disrupting the opponent's game plan, leading to a fast and powerful victory.

This UWx Control deck focuses on utilizing counter spells, removal, and card advantage to control the game and outvalue the opponent. With cards like Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Teferi, Time Raveler, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while advancing its own board state with cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Quantum Riddler. The deck also includes efficient land destruction with Wasteland and disruptive spells like Stifle to further slow down the opponent. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to maintain control of the game through various means of disruption and card advantage.

The Boros Aggro deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Static Prison. The deck focuses on tempo and efficiency, using cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls to streamline its game plan. By combining efficient creatures with disruptive elements and burn spells, Boros Aggro aims to maintain control of the board and apply pressure to the opponent, ultimately overwhelming them before they can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game tempo by disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will, while also applying pressure with aggressive creatures like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent. The deck also utilizes efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out to keep the opponent's board in check. Wasteland is included to disrupt the opponent's mana base, and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and additional disruption. Overall, the deck aims to maintain control over the game while chipping away at the opponent's life total.

The deck focuses on assembling the combo of using Doomsday to set up a winning sequence with Thassa's Oracle. It includes plenty of card selection and manipulation with cards like Ponder, Brainstorm, and Personal Tutor to find key pieces quickly. The deck also includes disruption in the form of Thoughtseize and Force of Will to protect the combo from being disrupted. The deck aims to win quickly and efficiently by using cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal to generate mana and combo off as soon as possible.

This deck focuses on using control elements such as counterspells and removal to maintain board control and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It also includes card draw and selection to ensure consistency and find key cards. The deck aims to win by establishing a dominant board presence with powerful cards like Thundertrap Trainer and Murktide Regent, while also utilizing cards like Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student and Flame of Anor for additional advantage. The inclusion of cards like Dress Down and Back to Basics provides versatility and additional disruption against different strategies.

This deck focuses on quickly milling your entire library and winning the game with Thassa's Oracle. By casting spells to fuel the graveyard, using cards like Dark Ritual and Lotus Petal for mana acceleration, and sacrificing creatures for value with cards like Cabal Therapy, you aim to combo off and win the game in one explosive turn. With cards like Pact of Negation to protect your combo and ways to reanimate key pieces, the deck aims to win in the early turns before the opponent can establish a defense.

This deck focuses on using powerful artifacts and mana acceleration to quickly overwhelm opponents with aggressive plays. The key strategy involves utilizing cards like Coveted Jewel, Grim Monolith, and Transmute Artifact to generate massive amounts of mana and play high-cost threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn. The combination of ramp, disruption (Trinisphere), and card draw (Expedition Map, Tezzeret) allows the player to maintain control of the game and put pressure on the opponent. The goal is to build a strong board presence and finish off opponents with devastating attacks from big creatures like The One Ring or Chaos Defiler.

The key concept of this deck is to control the game while applying pressure with efficient creatures and disrupting the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to take advantage of tempo plays by utilizing cards like Force of Will, Daze, and Brazen Borrower to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy. With a mix of powerful creatures like Barrowgoyf and Murktide Regent, along with removal spells like Fatal Push and Snuff Out, the deck can quickly close out games while keeping the opponent on the back foot.

This UWx Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy while controlling the game tempo. It utilizes a range of counter spells and removal spells to handle threats, with cards like Force of Will, Swords to Plowshares, and Stifle. Card advantage is gained through cards like Brainstorm and Teferi, Time Raveler, while card selection is provided by Ponder and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. The deck also has some bounce effects with Consign to Memory and Karakas, along with disruption with Wasteland. The deck aims to stabilize the board and take over the game with its powerful spells.
